description_long: This is a single-story modern house set on a landscaped plot with a mix of grass, stone, and shrubbery. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck extending over a stone outcrop, furnished with outdoor seating. The exterior walls are primarily white with some sections of stone or concrete, and the property includes a detached garage with a dark roof. The backyard area has a hot tub and a terraced lawn, while the front is adorned with flowering trees and a paved walkway. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as bedrooms and bathrooms. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and landscaped surroundings including a detached garage and flowering trees.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the house with the main entryway, detached garage, and a clear view of the landscaped front yard and flowering trees.
description_view_1: The rear of the house is visible, highlighting the hot tub, terraced lawn, and the back entrance, with the garage and deck partially visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the large wooden deck with outdoor furniture, the stone outcrop, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_3: The opposite side reveals more of the backyard, additional flowering trees, and the connection between the house and the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, a few steps, and a paved walkway, flanked by landscaping and without elaborate decorative elements.
